name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers
notes: This rule defines all Container Log Sources on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Kubernetes Auditing, Amazon AWS Elastic Kubernetes Service
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Kubernetes Auditing, Amazon AWS Elastic Kubernetes Service
